description: Permissions for agent status actions only. No budget or billing changes.

permissions.reason: Read usage and governance reports needed before status actions.
Resolve owners and authorized admin users for status workflows.
Read app and service principal context for agent ownership and governance.
Read registered agents before status changes.
Perform approved status actions such as stop, block, disable or mark for review where supported.
Read Copilot package metadata in application contexts.
Modify app catalog entries (block/install) in application contexts.
Apply approved governance changes to Copilot package metadata where supported.
Read Limited Mode settings during signed-in review flows.
Change Limited Mode settings only after explicit approval.
Read Copilot policy settings for review and approval.
Change Copilot policy settings only after explicit approval.
Read reports in signed-in status review flows.
Read registered agents in signed-in status review flows.
Perform approved delegated agent status actions where required by API.
Read Copilot package metadata in signed-in review flows.
Change Copilot package metadata only after explicit approval.
Modify app catalog entries (block/install) in delegated sessions.
Enable approved signed-in WorkIQ agent query flows. The WorkIQ service principal is only a prerequisite resource, not a separate app profile.

notes: AgentStatusAction is isolated from billing and budget changes.
WorkIQ is tracked as a prerequisite service principal only.
